hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('file_path', '')
filename = path.split('/')[-1]
if re.match(r'^\.env(\.|$)', filename):
    print('Blocked: .env files must not be edited via Claude. Edit manually or use \"vercel env\".', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
if filename == 'vercel.json':
    print('Blocked: vercel.json controls CORS and routing. Edit manually and confirm changes.', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
"
